content.full_text:
December 20, 2001

Dr. Margaret L. Dominici
Shasta Mainstream GOP Committee
1738 El Capitan Drive
Redding, CA 96001

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-01-289

Dear Dr. Dominici:

This letter is to confirm that, per our telephone conversation of December 14, 2001, you have withdrawn your letter seeking advice regarding the campaign reporting provisions of the Act.

If you have any additional questions concerning your committee, please feel free to call our Technical Assistance Division toll-free at (866) 275-3772.

Sincerely,

Carla Wardlow
Division Chief
Technical Assistance Division
